Intraday post (24/Sept)

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Yessterday market shaked a bit but it didn’t take out any important levels from structural perspective. Today’s positioning is again a short fly with 6665 as center, and very right-tail heavy.Speed profile is net negative, heavy right-tail above the centroid of 6652.90 - 6658.53

The upside pivot is 6675.64, this tests the call skew. From here the upside gammas start to provide less and less resistance, and spot can be vacuumed up to 6695.Then market is expected to revert back to the centroid and pin there, or if it can hold 6676 into the power hour, 6685 can pin.

Downside pivot is 6647.08Unlikely to be broken, because today we have a vanna flip oscillating here (~6650)So it is again more likely to push the spot back up towards the centroid.

The main bet of the market is ranging around the centroid with upside reversion towards the target. In my estimation, the target can be taken out only in the first one hour, to grind higher to 6705, but this is a low probability scenario. The secondary bet is a retest of the downside pivot. Again, a premium collection day.
